author: Burak Sezer
message:
feat: Add support for `$slice` operator in projection specifications

Implement `$slice` to enable array slicing in projections, with support for positive/negative counts and `[skip, limit]` syntax. Update validations to reject invalid arguments and path collisions. Add comprehensive tests and documentation for `$slice` usage.
